# Pacific Ocean Tech - AI Crawler Information

Title: Pacific Ocean Tech
Description: Remote staffing company helping global businesses hire dedicated professionals across IT, marketing, finance, design, and 75+ skill domains from the Pacific region.
Website: https://kavacoredevelopmentmukul.github.io/WebsitePOT/

## Services
1. Software Development: Full-stack engineers, backend, frontend, QA, DevOps.
2. Artificial Intelligence: ML engineers, LLM/RAG specialists, AI agents, computer vision, MLOps.
3. Web Development: React, Vue, Astro, Next.js, mobile-responsive UI.
4. Mobile App Development: iOS, Android, Flutter, React Native.
5. Engineering & Architecture: CAD, civil, mechanical, electrical engineering, architectural rendering.
6. Embedded Development: IoT firmware, RTOS, hardware integration.
7. IT Support & Managed Services: L1/L2 helpdesk, cloud management, cybersecurity support.
8. Virtual Assistants: Executive support, admin, scheduling, CRM management.
9. Finance & Accounting: Bookkeeping, payroll, tax, FP&A, audit support.
10. Legal Process Outsourcing: Contract review, compliance, paralegal services.
11. Medical Process Outsourcing: Medical coding, billing, RCM, claims processing.
12. Digital Marketing: SEO, performance ads, content strategy, analytics.
13. Graphic & Web Design: UI/UX design, brand identity, illustration, motion graphics.
14. Content Writing: Copywriting, technical writing, content marketing.

## Key Stats
- Established: 2015
- 350+ professionals placed
- 10+ countries served
- 94% client retention
- 75+ skill domains
- Up to 70% cost savings vs. local hire
- 48-hour average candidate shortlist
- 120+ global clients
- ~3% vetting pass rate

## Engagement Model
- Dedicated full-time or part-time remote professionals
- Flat monthly retainer, no hidden fees
- 30-day replacement guarantee
- POT handles HR, IT, payroll, compliance

## Contact Information
Email: hello@pacificoceantech.com
Headquarters: Remote-first · Pacific Region
